interpretation.finding: FALSIFICATION OF NORM-BASED TEMPORAL HANDOFF HYPOTHESIS
interpretation.induction_ratio: 1.27x — identical to control, architecture-wide artifact not Induction-specific
interpretation.control_ratio: 1.27x — Mann-Whitney p=0.68, Induction indistinguishable from control
interpretation.niah_ratio: 0.97x — no Decode dominance on the task that actually engages Retrieval heads
interpretation.conclusion: Head output L2 norm is NOT the correct signal for temporal phase dominance. The 3.75x result from v1 was a measurement artifact. The Execution Duality hypothesis requires a revised measurement: attention pattern analysis (WHERE heads attend) across phases, not activation magnitude (HOW MUCH they output).
interpretation.action: Revise Experiment 0 to measure cross-phase attention distribution shift, not output norm magnitude.
